backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that stores ResearchPaper records (with 17 fields including title, abstract, methodology, etc.) per Principal, providing query/save/download functions.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three PDF-related features: replacing text download with PDF generation in DownloadButton.tsx, formatting PDFs to match template structure, and updating downloadHelper.ts for PDF support.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON object containing one-line summaries of 20 frontend files including components, pages, hooks, and utilities for the research paper application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark theme colors using OKLCH color space, including academic color palette definitions.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script loading main.tsx for the RDXper application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router setup defining three routes (/, /dashboard, /paper) wrapped in Layout component with type-safe router configuration.
frontend/src/components/AuthButton.tsx: Authentication button component displaying sign-in/sign-out controls with loading states and truncated principal display for authenticated users.
frontend/src/components/DownloadButton.t: Button component that calls downloadPaperAsPDF utility to open browser print dialog for PDF generation with toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout wrapper with sticky header (logo, navigation, auth button), main content area, and footer with attribution link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/LoadingStates.ts: Exports FormSkeleton and PaperSkeleton components using Skeleton UI elements for loading states.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Navigation component with Dashboard and My Paper buttons that highlight based on current route path.
frontend/src/components/PaperList.tsx: Card component displaying saved paper status with view button or empty state message, using useCheckPaperSaved hook.
frontend/src/components/PaperMetadata.ts: Component displaying research paper title and formatted/truncated author principal in centered layout.
frontend/src/components/PaperView.tsx: Displays a complete research paper with sections including title, abstract, keywords, introduction, government framework, factors, comparative analysis, objectives, literature review, methodology, data analysis, results, discussion, policy recommendations, conclusion, and citations. Includes a download button and uses Card components for layout.
frontend/src/components/ProtectedRoute.t: A route guard component that checks for Internet Identity authentication, redirects unauthenticated users to home, and shows a loading spinner during initialization.
frontend/src/components/ResearchTopicFor: Form component for entering a research topic that generates a sample research paper structure with predefined sections and saves it using the backend actor. Handles authentication checks and displays toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, automatically invalidating and refetching dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for login/logout functionality, managing AuthClient creation, identity state, and login status throughout the application.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching research paper data, checking if a paper is saved, and saving papers to the backend canister with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining an academic color palette (deep blues and warm golds) for both light and dark modes, plus typography enhancements for scholarly content.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Protected dashboard page displaying a research topic form for generating new papers and a list of saved research papers, wrapped in a centered container layout.
frontend/src/pages/GeneratedPaper.tsx: Protected page that fetches and displays a generated research paper using PaperView component, with loading states, error handling, and empty state messaging.
frontend/src/pages/Landing.tsx: Landing page component for RDXper that displays a hero section with logo and call-to-action, plus a features section highlighting the app's capabilities (comprehensive structure, academic rigor, easy export, security). Redirects authenticated users to the dashboard.
frontend/src/utils/downloadHelper.ts: Utility functions for downloading research papers as plain text or PDF. Formats papers with all 12 sections (introduction, literature review, methodology, etc.), handles file creation, and triggers browser print dialog for PDF generation.
frontend/src/utils/pdfFormatter.ts: Generates printable HTML for research papers with academic formatting including A4 page size, Times New Roman font, proper section hierarchy, and print-optimized CSS styles following scholarly document conventions.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining the design system with OKLCH color variables, custom typography (Inter/Merriweather fonts), academic-themed shadows, container settings, and animation utilities for accordion components.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking RDXper's architecture (AI-powered research paper generator with Internet Identity auth), implemented features (authentication, topic input, outline generation, download), and technical requirements (8000-10000 word papers, APA citations, statistical analysis).
